title: thelesperma graminiformis
intro: Thelesperma graminiformis, also known as Gray's hairy prairie clover, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelesperma graminiformis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
